text:
The Ishbal Massacre is the 15th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

A decade ago, the military descended on Ishval to end a long civil war. The unspeakable atrocities which followed continue to haunt the Ishvalan people—and the State Alchemists who committed them.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 7: After the Rain 
In this episode, there is an unidentified alchemist that has a few lines. It is not until 6 episodes later in Episode 21 that he would be properly introduced as the Crimson Alchemist, Zolf J. Kimbley. 

See also
